name: fit4110-lab04-docker-packaging
description: FIT4110 Lab 04 - Docker packaging and Newman verification for Smart Campus services

scripts.test:local: npx newman run postman/collections/analytics.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/analytics_local.postman_environment.json -r cli,junit,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report-local.html --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-report-local.xml
